title: Creative Genius
definition: Nature's most unhinged creative force, capable of mimicry, innovation, and archiving local environments.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A creature that can mimic sounds, solve problems, and remember its surroundings like a living memory bank.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: An extraordinary being capable of mimicking various sounds, displaying intelligence, and creating innovative performances.
difficulty_levels.expert: This concept highlights the extraordinary ability of certain species to creatively imitate their environment, exhibit intelligence, and engage in complex behaviors.

extra_fields.insight: The realization that some creatures embody a level of creative genius that is both alien and familiar.
